functions.title: Guide Book #29

§7Guide Book #29§r
§lArtifacture Table§r
§8BLOCK§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lFound naturally in§r: Book Curserer Library
•§lCraftable on§r: Crafting Table
•§lStackable§r: 64
•§lBlast Resistance§r: 150.0

•§lHardness§r: 5.0
•§lLuminous§r: 8
•§lFlammable§r: NO
•§lMining Tool§r: Pickaxe
•§lDrops on breaking§r: Artifacture Table
•Can be activated using an §lAmethyst Shard§r for 5-6 minutes.
•The Artifacture Table is a crafting table
that requires an activation material to function. It is specialized for crafting the most unique and rarest items.§’
